{{Sagittarius}}

Sagittarius is the 1st month of the [[Gaian calendar]]. It contains 28 days (4 weeks) and corresponds to ISO weeks 1–4.

== Overview ==
===Etymology===
English ''Sagittarius'' "the Archer" (Latin < ''sagitta'' "arrow"). Japanese: {{ill|射手座|ja|Ite-za}} “archer-constellation.”  
===Gaiad themes===
Covers Weeks 1–4 (Days [[Sagittarius 1]]–[[Sagittarius 28]]): **Creation of the universe**, **Migration to Earth**, **Eukaryogenesis**, **Boring Billion**—Aster spins the cosmos, early life takes shape, and deep-time diversification begins.  

All precambrian
===EVENTS===
* [[Sagittarius 1]] — New Years (Aster Day)  
* [[Sagittarius 8]] — Coming of Age Day

==REFERENCES==
[[Category:Gaian calendar months]]

== Gregorian date ranges (±10 years) ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gaian Year !! Start Date !! End Date !! Gregorian Years
|-
| 12016 || 2016-01-04 || 2016-01-31 || 2016
|-
| 12017 || 2017-01-02 || 2017-01-29 || 2017
|-
| 12018 || 2018-01-01 || 2018-01-28 || 2018
|-
| 12019 || 2018-12-31 || 2019-01-27 || 2018, 2019
|-
| 12020 || 2019-12-30 || 2020-01-26 || 2019, 2020
|-
| 12021 || 2021-01-04 || 2021-01-31 || 2021
|-
| 12022 || 2022-01-03 || 2022-01-30 || 2022
|-
| 12023 || 2023-01-02 || 2023-01-29 || 2023
|-
| 12024 || 2024-01-01 || 2024-01-28 || 2024
|-
| 12025 || 2024-12-30 || 2025-01-26 || 2024, 2025
|-
| 12026 || 2025-12-29 || 2026-01-25 || 2025, 2026
|-
| 12027 || 2027-01-04 || 2027-01-31 || 2027
|-
| 12028 || 2028-01-03 || 2028-01-30 || 2028
|-
| 12029 || 2029-01-01 || 2029-01-28 || 2029
|-
| 12030 || 2029-12-31 || 2030-01-27 || 2029, 2030
|-
| 12031 || 2030-12-30 || 2031-01-26 || 2030, 2031
|-
| 12032 || 2031-12-29 || 2032-01-25 || 2031, 2032
|-
| 12033 || 2033-01-03 || 2033-01-30 || 2033
|-
| 12034 || 2034-01-02 || 2034-01-29 || 2034
|-
| 12035 || 2035-01-01 || 2035-01-28 || 2035
|-
| 12036 || 2035-12-31 || 2036-01-27 || 2035, 2036
|}

== Days in Sagittarius ==
{| class="wikitable"
! Day !! Link
|-
| 1 || [[Sagittarius 1]]
|-
| 2 || [[Sagittarius 2]]
|-
| 3 || [[Sagittarius 3]]
|-
| 4 || [[Sagittarius 4]]
|-
| 5 || [[Sagittarius 5]]
|-
| 6 || [[Sagittarius 6]]
|-
| 7 || [[Sagittarius 7]]
|-
| 8 || [[Sagittarius 8]]
|-
| 9 || [[Sagittarius 9]]
|-
| 10 || [[Sagittarius 10]]
|-
| 11 || [[Sagittarius 11]]
|-
| 12 || [[Sagittarius 12]]
|-
| 13 || [[Sagittarius 13]]
|-
| 14 || [[Sagittarius 14]]
|-
| 15 || [[Sagittarius 15]]
|-
| 16 || [[Sagittarius 16]]
|-
| 17 || [[Sagittarius 17]]
|-
| 18 || [[Sagittarius 18]]
|-
| 19 || [[Sagittarius 19]]
|-
| 20 || [[Sagittarius 20]]
|-
| 21 || [[Sagittarius 21]]
|-
| 22 || [[Sagittarius 22]]
|-
| 23 || [[Sagittarius 23]]
|-
| 24 || [[Sagittarius 24]]
|-
| 25 || [[Sagittarius 25]]
|-
| 26 || [[Sagittarius 26]]
|-
| 27 || [[Sagittarius 27]]
|-
| 28 || [[Sagittarius 28]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Horus]] (previous month)
* [[Capricorn]] (next month)
* [[Gaian calendar]]

[[Category:Gaian calendar months|01]]

{{Gaian calendar}}
